relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: A strong cloud-clothed messenger descends with rainbow and fire.
The opened little scroll rests in his hand over sea and earth.
The thunders are sealed, not written.
The messenger raises his hand to heaven.
By the Creator, delay is announced as ending.
The mystery of Divine moves toward completion.
John is told to take the opened scroll.
The scroll will be sweet in mouth and bitter in belly.
Prophetic word tastes sweet and becomes bitter within.
John must prophesy again concerning peoples, nations, tongues, and kings.

contemplative_note: Revelation 10 is prophetic embodiment: not everything is disclosed, and what is received as honey becomes bitter responsibility.
